purpose: Per-city labor economy. Profession counts are per-canonical-city baseline; small towns scale down proportionally; large cities scale up. Hours are per-shift averages. Hazard caps and seasonal reallocation rules are real OSHA-equivalent constraints the Tunyan kingdoms enforce by tradition and (in some kingdoms) by law.

annum_anchor.note: annum 409 is the present. The Bloc demanded more registrars in this very annum — players experience the political event live.

professions.notes: tied to didactic centers and amphitheaters; many are also herbalists or weavers in second profession
produce books printed via cephalopod-ink press; commissioned by Asbir's archive and Sahm's university; rare and prestige
operates the cephalopod-ink press; short shifts because the inking is physically demanding and the ink stains lifetime
intake citizens by need; the Bloc demanded more registrars in annum 409 — currently all kingdoms training additional cohorts
city-level governance below the kingdom-tier
lots of slack time; over the 30-hr-per-week minimum

professions.hazard_cap: short shifts to limit exposure to dirty/hazardous materials

professions.notes: keep the city's clocks aligned with the planetary sun/moon split per the canonical calendar
travel to one field per diurnal; check for disease, rot, drought, improper weeding
tend herb gardens; make satchels and tonics; sold at the Emporium
stalls in market squares; rotates with seasonal trades
operate canal locks, taxi systems, mechanical infrastructure
dock-loading; ports only
all-week vessel work; receive equal-time off as furlough; sealie-hunters are the top-tier captains
compensated for time away from family with semi-balanced schedules
open and close sites every diurnal

professions.hazard_cap: poor ventilation; capped hours; stipend higher per-hour than most professions

professions.notes: start at dead-end of each canal, rake debris toward lock gate; debris carted to forge (burn) or compost pits
Medici visiting healers handle severe cases; nurses cover routine care, pregnancy, childhood illness
brave forests for dry firewood + peat; must fill the Fabricay before rainy season; switch to vendor-stall work in rainy season (3hr × 3 days/week to reduce arthritis)
matches fishermen 1:1 — implied: one cook per fisherman household; or industrial-scale food service
tonics, dyes, preservation chemistry, the cephalopod-ink fixative
every diurnal but reduced capacity; on-call for emergencies
meet once weekly during the in-session season for regional governance; 4 sessions per annum (one per season)
primary work in rainy season; many also work as fuel gatherers in dry season

professions.hazard_cap: exposed to human urine in textile processing (jute/flax/wool/skin/hair fiber expansion); shifts capped to limit chronic exposure

professions.notes: tend the cactem insect colony for red dye; only practiced on the Cactem Strip in Bahiij
extract ink from caught cephalopods; supply chain feeds the print press, registrars, and authors

professions.count_per_city: Fluxom + select Sahm + select Aekon vessels
professions.hazard_cap: extreme. Single-figure-percent voyage mortality. Compensation: lifetime wealth on a successful kill.
professions.notes: sealies are massive — bigger than a killer orca — razor teeth, dense narwhal-horn, supercavitating speed. The single most dangerous animal on Tunya. A successful sealie kill yields blubber + ivory + bones + the defensive sac for purple dye, all of which together exceed a year's wages for the entire vessel.

seasonal_reallocation.fuel_gatherer_to_vendor_stall_in_rainy_s: Per Fabricay-fill schedule. Reduces arthritis from cold-wet forest work.
seasonal_reallocation.weaver_loomer_active_in_rainy_season: Indoor textile work peaks when forest work pauses.
seasonal_reallocation.sealie_hunters_pause_in_pisces_brine: Sealies migrate to deeper waters during the deep-sea fishing season; sealie hunts pause to avoid encountering migration packs.
